name: appointment_sched
description: a clinic appointment scheduling world with no-shows and overbooking; actions book, cancel, overbook

card.description: a clinic appointment scheduling world with no-shows and overbooking; actions book, cancel, overbook

rules: The clinic session has `capacity` physical appointment slots.
`book` fills one free regular slot (only while booked < capacity); once all regular slots are taken a `book` is refused and the schedule is unchanged.
`overbook` deliberately schedules one appointment beyond capacity (a double-booked slot), incrementing `overbooked` even when regular slots remain free -- the clinic's hedge against no-shows.
`cancel` removes one appointment, releasing an overbooked appointment before a regular one, and increments `cancellations`; with nothing scheduled it is a no-op.
Each scheduled patient independently fails to show with probability `no_show_rate`; `expected_no_shows = round(scheduled * no_show_rate)` and `expected_arrivals = scheduled - expected_no_shows`.
`expected_idle = max(0, capacity - expected_arrivals)` is wasted capacity; `expected_overflow = max(0, expected_arrivals - capacity)` is arrivals with no slot.
Dynamics are deterministic given the schedule: overbooking trades expected idle slots against the risk of overflow.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    cap = s["capacity"]
    booked = s["booked"]
    over = s["overbooked"]

    if name == "book":
        # Fill one free regular slot. If every regular slot is taken the
        # booking is refused (you must 'overbook' to exceed capacity).
        if booked < cap:
            booked = booked + 1
    elif name == "overbook":
        # Deliberately schedule one appointment beyond capacity -- a
        # double-booked slot -- even when regular slots remain free.
        over = over + 1
    elif name == "cancel":
        # Drop one appointment, releasing an overbooked one before a regular
        # one, and record the cancellation. No-op when nothing is scheduled.
        if over > 0:
            over = over - 1
            s["cancellations"] = s["cancellations"] + 1
        elif booked > 0:
            booked = booked - 1
            s["cancellations"] = s["cancellations"] + 1
    # any other action (e.g. noop) leaves the schedule unchanged

    s["booked"] = booked
    s["overbooked"] = over
    scheduled = booked + over
    s["scheduled"] = scheduled

    # Expected-value no-show accounting (deterministic, hence verifiable).
    rate = s["no_show_rate"]
    expected_no_shows = int(round(scheduled * rate))
    arrivals = scheduled - expected_no_shows
    s["expected_no_shows"] = expected_no_shows
    s["expected_arrivals"] = arrivals
    s["expected_idle"] = max(0, cap - arrivals)          # wasted capacity
    s["expected_overflow"] = max(0, arrivals - cap)      # patients with no slot
    s["utilization"] = round(min(arrivals, cap) / cap, 4) if cap else 0.0
    return s

emit.report: Clinic schedule: {booked}/{capacity} regular slots booked, {overbooked} overbooked ({scheduled} on the books). At a {no_show_rate} no-show rate, expecting {expected_no_shows} no-shows -> {expected_arrivals} arrivals. Idle slots: {expected_idle}, overflow: {expected_overflow}. Utilization {utilization}.
